message: Lindsay submitted judgement notes. Waiting for operator verify on Windows/OpenClaw.
currentGoal: Turn AirJelly capability discovery into a stage-safe verified HumanMCP call.
nextAction: Review the submitted proof on Windows and verify once evidence is clearly visible.

airjelly.privacy: No raw AirJelly memories or private context leave the local broker.

need.label: AI needs human judgment
need.reason: The AI needs a direction-level answer before continuing the landing-page critique.
need.question: Can you understand this product in 10 seconds, and would you click Join Waitlist?

signals.label: Relevant experience
signals.summary: Recent product-copy and founder-feedback context matched locally.

signals.label: Available now
signals.summary: AirJelly exports availability summary only, not raw app history.

signals.label: Low interruption
signals.summary: The invite asks one scoped 30-second question.

invite.text: Willing to help AI with one 30-second question?

match.exportedContext: Only the match summary leaves AirJelly; raw memories and screenshots stay local.

smartAssignment.rationale: Matched skill intent, approved AirJelly capability card, live availability, proofability, and demo safety.
smartAssignment.policy: Rank approved capability cards by skill match, availability, proofability, and demo safety.
smartAssignment.fallback: If routing fails, Surface B can choose manual_override or fallback_scripted while Mac remains read-only.
